property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\zulu17.56.15-ca-jdk17.0.14-win_x64\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Users\ROG\Miniconda3\condabin;C:\Users\ROG\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\local\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\ROG\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\mingw64\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\PuTTY;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\zulu17.56.15-ca-jdk17.0.14-win_x64\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\zulu17.56.15-ca-jdk17.0.14-win_x64\bin;C:\Users\ROG\.cargo\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin;C:\Users\ROG\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\ROG\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\ROG\.local\bin;C:\Users\ROG\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\GitHub.Copilot_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\ROG\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Anthropic.ClaudeCode_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\ROG\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\ROG\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\ROG\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\vendor_perl;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin\core_perl;.

testcase.name: executeScan_shouldUseCvssV3Score
testcase.system-out: 21:14:12.606 [main] INFO com.alibaba.dependencycheck.service.ScanTaskExecutorService -- 扫描任务 10 完成，共 1 个依赖，1 个有漏洞

testcase.name: executeScan_shouldNotScanWhenTaskNotExists
testcase.system-out: 21:14:12.611 [main] WARN com.alibaba.dependencycheck.service.ScanTaskExecutorService -- 扫描任务不存在，可能已被删除或 ID 无效: taskId=999

testcase.name: executeScan_shouldUpdateStatusToCompletedOnSuccess
testcase.system-out: 21:14:12.614 [main] INFO com.alibaba.dependencycheck.service.ScanTaskExecutorService -- 扫描任务 10 完成，共 0 个依赖，0 个有漏洞
